args: script="mcp-servers/sinan-state/index.js"; for root in "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$PWD"; do if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/$script" ]; then exec node "$root/$script"; fi; done; found=$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache" "$HOME/.codex/.tmp/marketplaces" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces" -path "*/sinan*/$script" -type f 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -n 1); if [ -n "$found" ]; then exec node "$found"; fi; echo "sinan-state MCP entrypoint not found" >&2; exit 1

_codex.instructions: Use sinan_status to orient on campaign, fleet, telemetry, and artifact state before invoking Sinan workflows.
